title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
summary: A complete AI agent toolkit with specialized agents for frontend development, Reddit community management, creativity injection, and fact-checking. 112,430 stars, each agent has independent persona and expertise definitions.
chinese_summary: 完整 AI Agent 工具集，含前端开发、社区运营、创意和事实核查等多专业 Agent，112,430 星。每个 Agent 具有独立人格和专业技能定义。
